svg.title: ThreatLens system architecture
svg.desc: Five-tier architecture: React frontend, FastAPI gateway, three core service engines, data storage, and five external threat intelligence APIs queried in parallel with asyncio

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should the ThreatLens dashboard be designed? What widgets and charts should it include?')
sendPrompt('How should the IOC Lookup interface work in ThreatLens? What UX patterns are best for SOC analysts?')
sendPrompt('How should the analyst workspace work in ThreatLens? Cover notes, tags, and history tracking in detail.')
sendPrompt('How should ThreatLens generate PDF reports? What should be included and how does MITRE mapping appear in reports?')
sendPrompt('Explain the ThreatLens FastAPI backend architecture in detail — routes, middleware, JWT auth, and async task handling.')
g.text: REST endpoints · JWT auth · rate limiting · async workers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the IOC normalizer in ThreatLens — how does it detect IOC type, validate, and parse IPs vs domains vs URLs vs hashes?')
sendPrompt('Explain how the ThreatLens query engine uses asyncio to query 5 threat intel APIs in parallel. Show the Python asyncio.gather pattern.')
sendPrompt('Explain the ThreatLens reputation scoring algorithm and MITRE ATT&CK mapping in full detail.')
sendPrompt('Explain the full ThreatLens database schema — all tables, columns, relationships for IOCs, scans, notes, tags, enrichment, and MITRE mappings.')
sendPrompt('How should Redis caching work in ThreatLens? What gets cached, for how long, and why?')
sendPrompt('Show me the ThreatLens VirusTotal API integration code — async handler, parsing malicious/suspicious counts, and error handling.')
sendPrompt('Show me the ThreatLens AbuseIPDB API integration — async handler, confidence score parsing, and IOC type filtering.')
sendPrompt('Show me the AlienVault OTX API integration in ThreatLens — querying pulses, indicators, and threat actor data.')
sendPrompt('Show me the URLhaus API integration in ThreatLens — querying URL and hash status, parsing threat tags.')
sendPrompt('Show me the GreyNoise API integration in ThreatLens — classification parsing and distinguishing scanners from malicious actors.')
